title: RamseyOS Approval Item
description: An AI-generated draft awaiting user review. Created when a workflow run reaches a review step. Enforces the review-before-publish principle.

workflowRunId.description: ID of the workflow run that produced this draft.

workflowId.description: ID of the workflow definition (e.g., sonoma-lesson-planning).

title.description: Title for this approval item (e.g., 'Lesson Plan: Chemical Bonding').

content.description: The generated draft content. Typically markdown.

inputs.description: The inputs that were used to generate this draft. Preserved for context during review.

modelUsed.description: Which AI model generated this content.

status.description: Review status. Pending items appear in the Approval Queue.

revisionNotes.description: Notes added by the user when revising before approval.

revisedContent.description: Edited content if the user revised the draft before approving.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the approval was created.

reviewedAt.description: Timestamp when the user acted on this approval.
